quotes.verbatim_quote:
Apply the same principle of alternating the ascending and descending forms to the chords in patterns
No. 2, 3 and 4.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This is the method's core pedagogical rule for patterns 2-4, instructing students to systematically alternate directional forms rather than always starting the same way.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Apply the same principle of alternating the descending and ascending forms to the chords in patterns
No. 2, 3 and 4
quotes.why_load_bearing: This companion rule mirrors the ascending-first instruction but begins on the descending form, ensuring students practice both entry points across the same chord patterns.
